note: In-app browser evaluate context is read-only for DOM event/property mutation, so drag preview interaction is covered by unit tests in this step.
previewCssRules: .window-dock-preview { position: fixed; z-index: 9998; border: 1px solid rgba(120, 190, 255, 0.78); border-radius: 6px; background: rgba(52, 132, 224, 0.24); box-shadow: rgba(230, 246, 255, 0.18) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28) 0px 8px 22px; pointer-events: none; }

.window-dock-preview--merge-tabs { border-color: rgba(165, 216, 255, 0.92); background: rgba(95, 156, 232, 0.34); box-shadow: rgba(215, 241, 255, 0.68) 0px -2px 0px inset, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28) 0px 8px 22px; }
.window-dock-preview--split::after { position: absolute; border-radius: 4px; background: rgba(214, 241, 255, 0.86); content: ""; }
.window-dock-preview--floating { border-style: dashed; border-color: rgba(210, 220, 232, 0.62); background: rgba(190, 207, 225, 0.1); box-shadow: rgba(230, 246, 255, 0.1) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset; }
